name: @superagent/desktop
description: SuperAgent desktop app (Electron) — a Codex-inspired autonomous AI agent UI

scripts.build: npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/index.css && tsc && tsc -p models/tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('src/ui.html','dist/ui.html');fs.copyFileSync('src/pet.html','dist/pet.html')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const sd=p.join('models','lily','v1'),dd=p.join('dist','models','lily','v1');if(fs.existsSync(sd)){fs.mkdirSync(dd,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(sd).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.glb')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(sd,f),p.join(dd,f)));console.log('[build] copied Lily GLBs to dist/');}else{console.warn('[build] Lily GLBs not found');}"
scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('src/ui.html','dist/ui.html');fs.copyFileSync('src/pet.html','dist/pet.html')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const sd=p.join('models','lily','v1'),dd=p.join('dist','models','lily','v1');if(fs.existsSync(sd)){fs.mkdirSync(dd,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(sd).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.glb')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(sd,f),p.join(dd,f)));console.log('[build] copied Lily GLBs to dist/');}else{console.warn('[build] Lily GLBs not found');}" && concurrently -n "tailwind,tsc,models,electron" -c "blue,green,cyan,magenta" "npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/index.css -o dist/index.css --watch" "tsc -w" "tsc -p models/tsconfig.json -w" "nodemon --watch dist/main.js --watch dist/main --watch dist/gateway --watch dist/builder --exec electron dist/main.js --dev"
